name: kibo-relative-time
title: Relative Time
author: Kibo UI
description: Displays one time across multiple time zones.

changes: Paused the live clock while its root is offscreen or the document is hidden and replaced left padding with logical inline-start padding.
Merged formatting options with the requested timezone and applied per-zone format overrides instead of leaking them to the DOM.
Applied the RelativeTimeZoneDate className instead of silently discarding it.

modifications.change: Observed root and document visibility before running the live clock, changed its spacing to a logical utility, made formatting options honor each zone without leaking props to the DOM, and applied the date display className.
modifications.reason: Prevent continuous work while hidden or offscreen, preserve spacing in right-to-left layouts, and make the documented formatting and styling API behave consistently.
